ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the proposal */,
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who submitted the proposal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the proposal (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the proposal */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL or file path of the proposal document */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the proposal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the proposal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_research_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "research_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the evaluation */,
  "comments_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the overall evaluation comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the criterion */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the criterion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given for the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given for the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the evaluator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the proposal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the version was submitted */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)
